The '''South Apartments''' was a residential complex located in the [[Upper City]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Republic soldier|soldiers]] [[Carth Onasi]] and [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] used one of the apartments as a temporary hideout during the [[Rescue of Bastila Shan|rescue]] of [[Bastila Shan]].

Due to the strict laws of [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] not being allowed in the Upper City, this apartment complex became the home of many illegal aliens, such as [[Ixgil]] and his [[Unidentified Duros (South Apartments)|companion]], although it was also used as a hideout for [[Dia]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was hiding out in the apartment complex after she had a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on her head. The conditions of the apartments were considered too poor for the majority of the Upper City citizens, who were used to more glamorous accommodation, being the more wealthy citizens of Taris. The landlord of the South Apartments then began to rent the apartments out to illegal aliens as it was unlikely the Tarisian Authorities would bother investigating such a run-down building. The welfare and cleaning of the Apartments was managed by the old [[Janitor/Legends|janitor]] [[Kadir (Tarisian)|Kadir]] who was considered by the majority of the residents as quite a poor janitor, however Kadir believed he made the best of the limited resources he had available to him.

==Residents==
The Upper City South Apartments were used as a place of living and a hideout for oppressed aliens.

Those who were present there included:
*[[Ixgil]]
*[[Unidentified Duros (South Apartments)|A Duros]]
*A [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]]
*A [[Gender/Legends|Female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]]
*Two [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]]
*[[Dia]]
*[[Kadir (Tarisian)|Kadir]]
*[[Larrim]]
The Quarren, the Ithorians and the Twi'lek were generally skeptical of [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and his companions and showed mixed reactions to the Taris Situation and engagement in conversation.

The Quarren was seen wandering the halls and spoke to Revan about how he was an affluent and privileged individual before becoming trapped on Taris.

The Ithorians were fearful and dismissive of Revan engaging them, and so was the Twi'lek, who pled Revan to not harm her.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
